Class ManagerController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.ManagerController
public class ManagerController extends Object
Controller for the Manager UI. Handles navigation to different screens (reports, supervisor, subscriber) and manages the manager-specific functionality such as logout.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private javafx.scene.image.ImageView
    logoImageView
    ImageView for displaying the restaurant logo in the Manager UI.

  • Field Details

    • logoImageView

      private javafx.scene.image.ImageView logoImageView
      ImageView for displaying the restaurant logo in the Manager UI.

  • Constructor Details

    • ManagerController

      public ManagerController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle rb)
      Initializes the controller. Loads the restaurant logo image into the ImageView.
      Parameters:
      url - the location used to resolve relative paths for the root object, or null
      rb - the resources used to localize the root object, or null

    • onReports

      private void onReports()
      Handles the "Reports" button action. Navigates to the Month/Year selector screen for generating reports.

    • onLogOut

      private void onLogOut()
      Handles the "Log Out" button action. Logs out the current user and returns to the main menu.

    • onsupervisorscreen

      private void onsupervisorscreen()
      Handles navigation to the Supervisor screen. Marks that the navigation is from a higher role and switches to Supervisor UI.

    • onsubscriberscreen

      private void onsubscriberscreen()
      Handles navigation to the Subscriber screen. Marks that the navigation is from a higher role and switches to Subscriber UI.
